name: PEVA Cubic Shower Curtain Clear - Room Essentials™
description:
Bring simple elegance and functionality to your bath space with the Cubic Shower Curtain from Room Essentials™. Featuring a lightweight construction that's enhanced with waterproof qualities, this clear shower curtain helps protect your bathroom floor and keeps the water in the shower. Designed with a textured grid pattern, this decorative shower curtain also has a buttonhole top that allows for easy installation.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
